_comment: Per-user overrides. Copy to .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). These values take precedence over .claude/settings.json.

env._comment_env: MAX_THINKING_TOKENS caps extended thinking. Default (~32000) is often wasteful; 10000 gives ~70% cost reduction with minimal quality loss. CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL routes exploration subagents (Glob/Grep/Read-heavy work) to a cheaper model.

permissions._comment_permissions: Populate with your preferred allowlist. These extend the deny/ask/allow rules in settings.json.
